title: pelargonium tabulare
intro: Pelargonium tabulare, a species of succulent plant, is a member of the Geraniaceae family and is native to South Africa. It is also known as the " tabular rose geranium" and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety levels. The herbal preparations of P. tabulare typically involve its leaves being distilled into an essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, or infused in teas for medicinal purposes.
